explanation: The 'for loop' can be used when a block of code needs to be executed a set amount of times. 'statement1' is executed bevore the loop begins. For examle 'int idx = 0'. 'statement2' is the condition for the execution of the code inside of the loop. For example 'idx <= 5'. 'statement3' is executed everytime when the code in the loop got executed and is usually used to progress towards the end of the condition in 'statement2'. For example 'idx++'. In this example the loop would be executed 6 times for every number from 0 to 5.
